title: 25 S&P 500 Stocks to Target Next Month
text: Subscribers to  Chart of the Week  received this commentary on Sunday, July 23.

title: 3 S&P 500 Stocks With a Yield Worth Betting On
text: According to Finviz.com, if you're looking for high yield S&P 500 stocks, energy companies such as Pioneer Natural Resources (NYSE: PXD ) at 10.75% and Devon Energy (NYSE: DVN ) at 8.63% are the best of the best. Energy stocks have lost their momentum in 2023 — the worst-performing S&P 500 sector year-to-date, down 4.1% through July 21 — so it's unsurprising that energy stocks have some of the highest yields right now.

title: 7 Top Analyst Picks That Are Actually Not Worth Your Attention
text: Analyst ratings are a key factor that can influence an investor's decision to take a position in a stock. Analysts work for financial firms or investment banks.

title: The 3 Most Undervalued Retail Stocks to Buy Now: July 2023
text: The economy of the United States is primarily driven by consumption expenditure. A key part of consumption spending is retail sales.

title: ETF Areas & Stocks to Win Despite Muted June Retail Sales
text: Retail sales in the United States gained 0.2% sequentially in June of 2023, below forecasts of a 0.5% increase.

title: Back-to-School Shopping to Fall? Stocks to Win/Lose
text: Inflationary pressures are expected to dampen the back-to-school shopping season this year, per a new report from Deloitte, as quoted on Yahoo Finance.

title: Best Buy (BBY) Rides High on Growth Strategies: Apt to Hold
text: Best Buy's (BBY) omnichannel abilities including total tech initiative and curbside-pickup service are quite encouraging.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Cruising Towards A 20% Return
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF™, with a few minor twists. The portfolio gained 5.00% in June, underperforming the S&P 500 by 1.60%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 11.99% and trailing the S&P 500 by 4.90%. Since inception, the portfolio is generating 3.56% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart and Target's July sales events could mark consumer spending turnaround, says Placer.ai
text: Major retailers are preparing their big July sales events, with Amazon.com Inc.'s Prime Day, Best Buy Co.'s Black Friday in July, Walmart Inc.'s Plus Week and Target Corp.'s Circle Week all on deck.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For July 2023
text: Despite rising interest rates and stubborn inflation, equities have shown resilience in 2023 with the SPDR S&P Trust ETF adding 6.48% in June and up 16.80% year-to-date. My top 10 list of high dividend yield stocks has generated an annualized rate of return of 13.19% since its inception in November 2020. The list from June posted a solid gain of 5.63%, beating VYM but not SPY.
